Function Documentation

◆ fieldIsMDNode()

bool fieldIsMDNode ( const MDNode * DbgNode,
unsigned Elt )
static

Check if a field at position Elt of a MDNode is a MDNode.

We currently allow an empty string and an integer. But we don't allow a non-empty string in a MDNode field.

Definition at line 378 of file DebugInfo.cpp.

References llvm::cast(), getField(), and llvm::isa().

Referenced by llvm::DIGlobalVariable::Verify(), llvm::DISubprogram::Verify(), and llvm::DIVariable::Verify().
